summary: Iteration 16 Testing Complete - Onboarding State Consolidation to user_operator_profile Verified. All 6 backend API tests passed. Code review confirms correct implementation of all 10 features in the review request.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: _read_onboarding_state (line 5844) reads from user_operator_profile.operator_profile.onboarding_state FIRST, falls back to onboarding table with auto-migration
VERIFIED: _write_onboarding_state (line 5877) writes to user_operator_profile.operator_profile.onboarding_state, then syncs to onboarding table for backward compat
VERIFIED: GET /api/onboarding/status (line 5912) returns completed=false when no state exists - no auto-complete based on heuristics
VERIFIED: POST /api/onboarding/save (line 5936) has anti-regression logic at lines 5949-5952: if new_step < current_step_saved and new_step != 0, keeps current_step_saved
VERIFIED: POST /api/onboarding/complete (line 6006) writes completed=true to user_operator_profile first (line 6022), then creates account/links profile
VERIFIED: GET /api/business-profile/context (line 6156) reads onboarding state via _read_onboarding_state (line 6163)
VERIFIED: All 4 onboarding endpoints return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js line 67 reads onboardingStatus from useSupabaseAuth() context - NO API call made
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js line 279-298 fetches onboarding status ONCE during bootstrap after calibration check
VERIFIED: Legacy migration path works - _read_onboarding_state migrates from onboarding table to user_operator_profile on first read (line 5871)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified onboarding state consolidation. The authoritative source is now user_operator_profile.operator_profile.onboarding_state (JSONB key). The onboarding table is kept in sync for backward compatibility but is no longer the primary read source. Key functions: _read_onboarding_state checks user_operator_profile FIRST, falls back to onboarding table with auto-migration. _write_onboarding_state writes to both. Anti-regression prevents current_step from decreasing. No auto-complete based on company_name or heuristics.

features_verified.no_auto_complete: COMPLETE - GET /api/onboarding/status returns completed=false when no state exists
features_verified.save_writes_to_user_operator_profile: COMPLETE - POST /api/onboarding/save calls _write_onboarding_state which writes to user_operator_profile
features_verified.anti_regression: COMPLETE - current_step cannot decrease unless reset to 0 (lines 5949-5952)
features_verified.complete_writes_to_user_operator_profile: COMPLETE - POST /api/onboarding/complete sets completed=true in user_operator_profile first
features_verified.legacy_fallback_migration: COMPLETE - Falls back to onboarding table and auto-migrates to user_operator_profile
features_verified.protected_route_reads_from_context: COMPLETE - ProtectedRoute.js line 67 uses onboardingStatus from context
features_verified.context_fetches_once: COMPLETE - SupabaseAuthContext.js bootstrap fetches onboarding ONCE at line 280
